summary: Iteration 37 — Phase C Operational Ecosystem. Full backend + frontend testing pass. Backend: 10/10 Iter37 tests PASS + 23/23 Iter34/35/36 regression PASS (33/33 total). Frontend: New 4th 'Cross-module intelligence' tab renders all 6 sections (trends with 5 tiles, themes, repeats, unresolved, hotspots with locations/times/repeats, blindspots) + generated_at footer. ActionPlanPanel accountability UI rendering with 4 summary tiles (Overdue/Unowned/Escalated/Awaiting sign-off), assignee dropdown (9 options), priority + due-date inputs in create form. Full lifecycle PASS: create with assignee+due_date → inline reassign → inline due-date change → escalate (modal with target picker + reason + audit-logged) → resolve → manager sign-off (modal, only on resolved+unsigned) — Escalated and Signed-off badges visible after each step, success toast 'Action signed off' shown. StrategyMeetingPackButton: visible for manager on Maddy O'Brien (children's, age 17) with successful PDF download (header %PDF...); correctly NOT visible for manager on Margaret Lewis (adult), for senior on children's, and for staff on children's. Audit endpoint returns 6 strategy_meeting_pack_download events with correct object_id and actor.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' on rendered staff-picker <option> elements. Caused by framework's dev-mode x-ve-dynamic instrumentation wrapping the option text in a styled span. Non-blocking (UI works fully), but spams the browser console. Could be suppressed by rendering plain text inside <option>{s.name}</option> with no template wrappers, or this may be a known dev-only side effect of the framework instrumentation.

action_items: Optional: investigate the recurring <span>-inside-<option> React hydration console warning visible on /ofsted Command-centre Escalate modal target-select and on action-plan-new-assignee. The select itself works; only console is noisy.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend RBAC is correctly enforced on both new endpoints (cross-module-patterns senior+, strategy-meeting-pack/{id}.pdf manager+, /escalate manager+, /sign-off manager+).
Strategy pack 404 path works for unknown resident; PDF starts with %PDF and is >1.5KB.
Audit endpoint correctly persists 'strategy_meeting_pack_download' with actor_name + object_id for every download.
Frontend correctly hides StrategyMeetingPackButton on adult residents (verified with Margaret Lewis) and on senior/staff roles — confirms children's-services-only + manager+ gating end-to-end.
ActionPlanPanel sign-off button correctly only renders on resolved+unsigned actions (not visible on open actions, appears on Resolved tab after resolve).
Patterns view repeat_concern_children correctly enforces count>=2 AND at least 2 concern_types (verified via Mads/Aisha tiles).
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 (used for all positive paths); senior@care.local / Senior@123 + staff@care.local / Staff@123 (used for RBAC negative paths)
seed_data_creation: Created one InspectionAction 'Lifecycle test action' via UI for end-to-end lifecycle, then deleted via UI delete button. Three audit events (strategy_meeting_pack_download) were generated during testing — these persist in audit log by design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 fully verified. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration37.py (10/10 pass). Always set REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env before pytest. /ofsted now has 4 tabs: ofsted-tab-command, ofsted-tab-regulation_44, ofsted-tab-simulation, ofsted-tab-patterns. ActionPlanPanel testid pattern: action-plan-item-<id>, action-assign-<id>, action-due-<id>, action-escalate-<id>, action-signoff-<id>, badge-overdue/escalated/signedoff-<id>, escalate-modal+escalate-to-select/name/reason/submit, signoff-modal+signoff-notes/submit, accountability-summary, action-plan-new-btn/form/title/priority/due/assignee/save. Strategy meeting pack: strategy-meeting-pack-bar + strategy-meeting-pack-btn on ResidentDetail Safeguarding tab — only on children's residents + manager tier. Sample children's resident: a1fb73b6-aced-4cf3-a053-0b861183f897 (Maddy O'Brien). Adult resident: 9349f6d9-a222-465f-90b4-6781a824fee8 (Margaret Lewis).
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. Only a noisy (non-blocking) console warning about <span> inside <option> caused by the framework's dev-mode dynamic-content instrumentation injecting a styled span wrapper around dynamic option text. Functionally the <select> works normally and form submission selects the correct value.
